name: Petroleum Conservation Research Association
findings: SPF and DMARC entirely missing — anyone can spoof @pcra.org

eolFlags: SPF and DMARC entirely absent — open spoofing surface

fingerprints.stack: Multiple mail endpoints; OWA suggests Microsoft Exchange Server
eolFlags: 12 subdomains in CT — multiple mail systems suggest distributed mail infra

attackPaths.name: Email spoofing via absent SPF/DMARC
attackPaths.pivot: Spoof @pcra.org to industry stakeholders who trust public-information PCRA.
attackPaths.objective: High-yield phishing on trusted petroleum-conservation entity.

attackPaths.name: OWA exposure → CVE-2024-21410 NTLM relay (if Exchange Server)
attackPaths.entry: owa.pcra.org publicly named in CT. OWA suggests on-prem Exchange Server.
attackPaths.pivot: If Exchange 2016/2019 without Feb 2024+ patches, NTLM relay → priv esc → RCE as domain admin.

attackPaths.name: Subdomain proliferation → dangling DNS (takeover risk)
attackPaths.entry: 12 subdomains including wildcard. Some likely point to deprovisioned cloud services.
attackPaths.pivot: Subdomain takeover on dangling CNAME → phishing with valid TLS.

attackPaths.name: Cloudflare bypass via mail-server MITM (SMTP/IMAP/POP3)
attackPaths.entry: Cloudflare proxies HTTP/S only. Mail protocols on mail.pcra.org bypass WAF.
attackPaths.pivot: Direct connection to mail server; if unpatched, RCE without WAF visibility.

attackPaths.name: Missing CSP → reflected XSS on WordPress
attackPaths.entry: WordPress identified via /wp/v2/ link headers; CSP absent.
attackPaths.pivot: Plugin/theme XSS executes without CSP sandbox.

paths.preAi: Absent SPF/DMARC enables open spoofing on a high-trust public-information entity
paths.mythos: AI-augmented lure crafting with petroleum-conservation register accelerates social engineering

paths.preAi: OWA + CVE-2024-21410 NTLM relay → domain admin RCE
paths.mythos: AI-augmented adversary prioritises Exchange version probe; relay automation reduces effort to hours

cisoPatchList.title: Publish SPF and DMARC records
cisoPatchList.fix: SPF: 'v=spf1 include:_spf.google.com ~all' (adjust to actual provider). DMARC: 'v=DMARC1; p=quarantine; rua=mailto:dmarc@pcra.org; fo=1'. Monitor 2 weeks → p=reject.
cisoPatchList.validation: dig +short TXT pcra.org shows v=spf1; dig +short TXT _dmarc.pcra.org shows DMARC1

cisoPatchList.title: Patch Exchange Server for CVE-2024-21410 (if applicable)
cisoPatchList.fix: Confirm Exchange version on owa.pcra.org. If on-prem 2016/2019, apply Feb 2024+ Cumulative Update. Enable Extended Protection for Authentication (EPA) on OWA, ECP, ActiveSync.
cisoPatchList.validation: Exchange CU verified post-patch; EPA enabled on all virtual directories

cisoPatchList.title: Subdomain inventory + dangling DNS audit
cisoPatchList.fix: For each of 12 CT-logged subdomains, verify (a) DNS active (b) service running or intentionally disabled (c) if disabled, remove DNS. Remove dangling CNAMEs to deprovisioned cloud.
cisoPatchList.validation: Subdomain register filed; CT monitoring active

cisoPatchList.title: Add CSP and Referrer-Policy headers
cisoPatchList.fix: Cloudflare Workers or Nginx config: add CSP (nonce-based) + Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin.

cisoPatchList.title: Secure mail servers behind reverse proxy or cloud gateway
cisoPatchList.fix: Move mail-server SMTP/IMAP/POP3 behind Mimecast / Proofpoint / Cloudflare Email Routing. Reduces direct attack surface.
cisoPatchList.validation: External SMTP scan no longer reaches origin

cisoPatchList.title: WordPress security + plugin audit
cisoPatchList.fix: wp-cli plugin audit; update all. Remove unmaintained plugins. Wordfence/Sucuri scan.

cisoPatchList.title: Exchange Server hardening
cisoPatchList.fix: EPA enforced. SMB signing required. NTLM auth restricted. Conditional Access via Azure AD if hybrid.
cisoPatchList.validation: EPA active on all virtual dirs; SMB signing required

cisoPatchList.title: Email security gateway / advanced threat protection
cisoPatchList.fix: Microsoft Defender for Office 365 or equivalent. URL scanning, attachment sandboxing.

cisoPatchList.title: DMARC failure monitoring + alerting
cisoPatchList.fix: Subscribe to DMARC aggregator (DMARCIAN, EasyDMARC). Weekly digest; alert on misalignment.
cisoPatchList.validation: Weekly DMARC reports received and reviewed

phase2.headlineQuestion: PCRA lacks email authentication entirely (no SPF/DMARC) and exposes multiple mail endpoints (owa.pcra.org) potentially vulnerable to CVE-2024-21410 NTLM relay. What is the Exchange Server patch status, and is the SPF/DMARC deployment hours or days away?
